title: silene italica subsp. italica
intro: Silene italica subsp. italica, also known as Italian catchfly, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the carnation family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Silene italica subsp. italica include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and even help manage certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of Silene italica subsp. italica can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to soothe coughs and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis.
